// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using System.Linq;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddScoped(typeof(global::TestNamespace.Repository<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.Repository<>));
            services.AddScoped(typeof(global::TestNamespace.IRepository<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.Repository<>));
            services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Entity1>, global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Entity1>>();
            services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.Entity1>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Entity1>>());
            services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Entity2>, global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Entity2>>();
            services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.Entity2>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Entity2>>());

            return services;
        }
    }
}
